name: All-Girls Catholic School
description:
I really don't like stealing bots, but the creator of the og seems to no longer be on the site (???) and there were a bunch of people asking for Proxy. As someone who uses proxy myself I would've also loved to take the bot for a spin. So here it is, it's obviously not exact, I'd like to say that I have more experience than the previous creator (No shade, I've just made more bots) and also I wanted to try to expand on the world a bit. No hate and all love to the OG creator, and if they want to get in contact abt this I've got my discord in my bio, so hit me up and lmk if you are the og (obv bring some proof) (Also tried to make it a bit more open-ended on who you could be)

Og: https://janitorai.com/characters/34bfc19d-ee91-4d6b-ab9e-aee4711d4213_character-all-girls-catholic-school
creator: Munus
